title: Add worst AI to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [worst AI](https://ai.cesustheteapot.dpdns.org/) to chat
- worst AI provides AI responses using pollinations.ai and requires pollinations auth to access the site. It combines generated content with user input, often including unhelpful information.

Fixes #11820

gist.headline: Gloriously unhelpful
gist.blurb: A new community app called 'worst AI' just landed in the Greenhouse. It uses Pollinations to generate delightfully unhelpful responses—because sometimes you just need a little chaos in your chat.
gist.summary: Added 'worst AI' to the Greenhouse, a community chat application that intentionally provides unhelpful AI responses using the Pollinations API.
gist.impact: Users can now explore this delightfully chaotic chat app, showcasing how developers can creatively use the API for comedic effect.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee looking amused at a retro terminal that is printing out a tangled, messy pile of paper, representing the 'unhelpful' AI responses. A fun, chaotic but cozy vibe.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot looking amused at a retro computer terminal that is printing out a tangled, messy pile of paper. The screen shows a chaotic smiley face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot looking amused at a retro computer terminal that is printing out a tangled, messy pile of paper. The screen shows a chaotic smiley face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
